title: Industrialization Lite
description: Industrialization Lite is a simple modpack. It evolves around modern industrialization with some extras, but aims to exist with a minimal amount of mods.
body:
# What do we have here…

This is a simple modpack around modern industrialization and some basic quality-of-life mods.

## Can I use it on a server and play with friends.

Defenitly you can, and you should :)

## Any special config adjustments?

Yes, the config has been changed from default. An example is Inventory Profiles Next, to tone its presence down a bit.
